channel.title: City Record Digest
channel.description: Notable NYC government notices — procurement, hearings, rules, and more

item.title: EMERGENCY EXECUTIVE ORDER No. 2.16
item.description:
Emergency executive order No. 2.16 from the Mayor. Executive orders carry the force of law and can reshape city policy, agency operations, and enforcement priorities.
Office of the Mayor | Special Materials

item.title: EMERGENCY EXECUTIVE ORDER No. 1.16
item.description:
Emergency executive order No. 1.16 from the Mayor. Executive orders carry the force of law and can reshape city policy, agency operations, and enforcement priorities.
Office of the Mayor | Special Materials

item.title: CNYG-624M Bronx & Manhattan Private Funding Tree Planting FY24
item.description:
$5.8M award by Parks and Recreation to JRCRUZ Corp. Large procurement worth tracking for scope and competitiveness.
Parks and Recreation | Procurement | $5.8M

item.title: Consultant Services
item.description:
Non-competitive award by Small Business Services to Staten Island Economic Development Corp for $130K. Sole-source contracts bypass competitive bidding and merit public scrutiny.
Small Business Services | Procurement | $130K

item.title: DCWP NOH Licensing Laws
